experiment: g9-llmproxy — STAND-IN blinded review (pinned cross-vendor LLM in the g9.review blinded-reviewer role over the 50 blinded authored-explication sheets); proxy for, and NOT, the frozen g9 GATE-H human review that alone adjudicates HS-A
candidate: fable-class-authoring (the g9 authoring-capability line, HS-A / the why-now check)
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json, following the f2b-transfer-llmproxy (proxy) and g8 (FAIL) assessment precedents. Scope discipline per tasking: this file + registry/assessments/m0a-llmproxy.json + assumptions.jsonl block ASM-0647-0659 ONLY; registry/audit-status.jsonl NOT touched (fable_interpretive_assessed update line reported to the coordinator for serial append); no verdict, experiment record, amendment, audit, log, or run artifact modified; no git/bd/kb-sync run; concurrent g3 runner + 2 Codex audits on disjoint files untouched.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern Fable/Opus execution split: the Opus runner produced only the mechanical run + verdict-gen output (registry/verdicts/g9-llmproxy.json, FAIL, fired rule /analysis/below_margin_proxy); what that FAIL-analog MEANS is decided here and only here. The frozen record's extrapolation_envelope_verbatim is adopted BINDING and quoted where load-bearing; every number below is a proxy quantity inside that envelope and none of it is, or ever becomes, the human g9 finding.

verdict_ref.fired_rule: /analysis/below_margin_proxy (FAIL-analog: one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound of the composite proxy rate < 0.34)

audit._note: correct as emitted — see audit_ruling below (ASM-0647)

parent_human_record.status: FROZEN, UNRUN, UNCONSUMED — the ONLY experiment on this line whose readout adjudicates HS-A; byte-untouched by the proxy and by this assessment

_surprise_note: No registered prior / claim.md exists for g9-llmproxy, so no surprise-* tag is licensed. Informally, and quotable only as planning-value context: the frozen record's wilson_gate expected_rate was 0.60 (the frozen g9 declaration, a POWERING stipulation, not a prereg prediction); the measured composite proxy rate is 0.18 — an 0.42 undershoot that lands decisively inside the FAIL-analog region (UB 0.2850 < 0.34) rather than near the boundary. Under envelope clause 6 the FAIL direction was pre-declared the MORE informative branch, because the named endorsement channels (tradition familiarity ASM-0552, style endorsement) plausibly push the composite UP — so the low number cannot be attributed to those channels. What the informal note deliberately does NOT say: that the explications are bad — see the severity caveat below.

audit_ruling.ruling: AUDIT NOT APPLICABLE for g9-llmproxy [STIPULATED: ASM-0647]. No Codex Gate-A audit is to be dispatched; the verdict object's audit.state N/A is correct as emitted and the FAIL stands MEASURED-UNAUDITED, exactly like every prior FAIL (f2, g7, g8).
audit_ruling.grounds: (1) House discipline: 'the audit gate fires on PASS only' — stated in docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md and instantiated by every FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE verdict in the registry carrying audit.state N/A while every PASS carries a CONFIRMED Gate-A audit [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/f2.json, g6.json, g7.json, g8.json vs a5.json, f1.json, l3a.json, m0b.json, f2b-replicate.json, f2b-transfer-llmproxy.json]. (2) Function: Gate-A protects against an erroneous self-favoring verdict licensing investment or citation; a FAIL-analog is self-disfavoring and its pre-registered consequence (pause + escalate, formally scoped to the proxy id) is conservative — an arithmetic error in the FAIL direction harms nothing the human g9 review does not later correct on the same frozen sheet bytes. (3) The frozen stage_discipline's 'cross-vendor audit' stage is the PASS-path enumeration, consistent with the g8 precedent's ruling that 'the Gate-A PASS-upgrade is inapplicable to a FAIL'. Discretionary exception: the maintainer MAY commission a courtesy recompute before acting on the escalation; nothing requires it.
audit_ruling.coordinator_action: Mark g9-llmproxy codex_audited: n/a (already so in registry/audit-status.jsonl). Do NOT dispatch a Gate-A audit.

interpretation.headline: The proxy authoring-capability check came back FAIL-analog, decisively and with a clean instrument: a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM reviewer (GPT-5.6-Sol, pinned, blind, byte-identical sheets to the pending human review) endorsed the composite (substitutable AND cross-translatable AND mechanically legal) on only 9 of 50 Fable-authored explication sheets — composite 0.18, one-sided 95% Wilson LB 0.1078 / UB 0.2850 against the frozen 0.34 bar, so even the most favourable reading of the data sits 5.5 points under the bar [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/g9-llmproxy.json]. All instrument gates held: 50/50 sheets labelled, 0 no-labels, preflight first-attempt pass, retest self-agreement 0.95, and the deranged-explication probe false-endorsed 0/50 [MEASURED: reports/auto/g9-llmproxy/analysis-output.json]. FRONT AND CENTRE, THE ENVELOPE: this is a WEAK feasibility proxy [STIPULATED: ASM-0550, ASM-0520] — the estimand is one GPT-5.x-family model's blind endorsement, NOT the blinded human review; the frozen g9 (GATE-H) remains the sole adjudicator of HS-A, and per the frozen kill text this proxy FAIL 'can neither fire nor discharge g9's own kill' and 'cannot weaken or strengthen the why-now argument or revert any authoring-cost estimate'. What it CAN do, it now does: per envelope clause 6 verbatim, it 'warrants pausing authoring-cost claims and escalating to the maintainer, while remaining formally scoped to this proxy id' — operationalised as ASM-0648.
interpretation.leg_diagnostics: The per-leg split is the single most actionable measured fact in the record. (1) The composite bottleneck is ENTIRELY the substitutability leg: sub_yes 0.18 equals the composite exactly, while xt_yes = 1.0 — every sheet the judge endorsed on substitutability it also endorsed on cross-translatability, and it endorsed cross-translatability on ALL 50 sheets [MEASURED: analysis-output sub_yes_rate, xt_yes_rate]. (2) The cross-translatability leg is measured to be content-insensitive for this judge: it endorsed xt on 94% of the DERANGED probe items too (probe_xt_yes_rate 0.94, reported-only). This empirically confirms the design-time weakest-leg flag [STIPULATED: ASM-0521, ASM-0523 — the xt leg is a judged text-intrinsic property with NO content-scramble control by construction]: the xt leg carried essentially zero discriminative signal in this run. Two consequences, both honest: the composite's failure cannot be blamed on the flagged-weakest leg (it sat at ceiling), and the composite is effectively a ONE-legged measurement (substitutability) rather than the two-legged construct the g9 bar names — a further reason the 0.34 comparison is form-preserving only [EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0522]. (3) The probe direction: 0/50 false endorsements on deranged paraphrases means the judge demonstrably withholds endorsement from wrong-for-the-word content — the channel that would have FABRICATED a proxy-PASS is bounded at zero (crude form). H-G9P-STYLE's crude form is closed in the direction that matters for believing the FAIL is not style-reflex noise.
interpretation.severity_caveat_binding: The controls in this design are ASYMMETRIC, and the FAIL must be read with that stated plainly: the deranged probe bounds false-ENDORSEMENT (the anti-PASS-fabrication channel), but a judge that near-always answers 'no' on substitutability would pass that probe trivially — the only easy-positive control in the instrument is the single preflight calibration sheet (expected yes/yes, passed first-attempt) plus the 9 real endorsements, so a global severity offset (a judge far harsher than the published DeepNSM evaluation protocol or a human reviewer on the question 'does a multi-clause reductive paraphrase preserve the meaning of each passage') is UNBOUNDED within this design and pushes DOWN. That is exactly the pre-registered severity-comparability flag [EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0522 — 'clearing or missing the margin is form-preserving only: NEITHER outcome bears on HS-A'], now biting in the observed direction. Corollary quantities, stated for calibration not conclusion: the proxy point 0.18 sits BELOW the published DeepNSM-8B point of 0.24, and the Wilson UB 0.2850 does not exclude 0.24 — under this judge's (uncalibrated) severity the Fable-authored set is statistically indistinguishable from the published point and decisively NOT 10-points-better; but because judge severity is uncalibrated cross-protocol, 'indistinguishable from DeepNSM-8B' is NOT a licensed conclusion either. The two honest statements coexist: the FAIL is a real early warning (the upward-pushing channels did not rescue it), AND it cannot be promoted to 'the explications are probably inadequate' (the downward severity channel is unbounded). The human g9.review on the identical sheet bytes resolves this directly — human-composite minus 0.18 on identical items is the severity-offset measurement ASM-0522's resolution path names.
licenses: [MEASURED] The FAIL-analog at exactly its construction: 'a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM, under blind sheet rendering with a working escape', endorsed the 50 Fable-authored explications at composite 9/50 = 0.18, Wilson UB 0.2850 < 0.34 — the g9-kill ANALOG at this proxy id, mirroring the frozen g9 kill in FORM ONLY.

[MEASURED] Instrument facts: 50/50 labelled, 0 no-label, retest 0.95 (>= 0.80 floor), deranged-probe false-endorsement 0.0 (< 0.30), probe coverage 50/50, preflight first-attempt pass. The adjudication machinery (blind rendering, seed-pinned order, working escape, per-call blinding grep with zero hits) executed end-to-end clean.

[MEASURED] The leg decomposition: substitutability is the sole bottleneck (sub_yes 0.18); the cross-translatability leg is content-insensitive for this judge (xt_yes 1.0 on real sheets, 0.94 on deranged probes) — the design-time weakest-leg disclosure (ASM-0521/ASM-0523) is now empirically demonstrated, not merely stipulated.

[STIPULATED: ASM-0648] The ENTIRE decision content of the FAIL — programme sequencing: pause on new authoring-cost/capability claims in plan documents pending human g9 (claims-hygiene, not claim-reversion); authoring-pipeline scale-up deferred pending maintainer decision; escalation to the maintainer (this assessment is the escalation instrument); human g9.review promoted to the authoring lane's critical path.

[MEASURED] The comparator for the human review is now pinned: per-sheet proxy labels on the exact sheet bytes the human will judge, so the eventual GATE-H review yields a free human-vs-proxy severity/bias measurement (ASM-0522 and ASM-0553 resolution paths) at zero marginal cost. As with the f2b proxy, this comparator role is the record's most durable scientific value.
does_not_license: [ENVELOPE-BOUND, kill text verbatim] The proxy FAIL 'can neither fire nor discharge g9's own kill, whose reviewer is a blinded HUMAN (GATE-H), and it cannot weaken or strengthen the why-now argument or revert any authoring-cost estimate'. HS-A is UNADJUDICATED. The frozen g9 kill's consequence ('kernel authoring cost estimates revert to human-authoring rates in every plan document') is NOT enacted — that reversion belongs to the human FAIL alone.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND, clauses 1-2] The estimand is GPT-5.x-family endorsement, single reviewer, no second judge; family-level bias can move the composite in either direction independent of real explication quality. Nothing here extends to human reviewers, other authoring runs, or other word sets.

[EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0522 — the ceiling on the negative reading] 'The explications are inadequate' is NOT a licensed conclusion: judge severity vs the published protocol is uncalibrated, the substitutability operationalisation is form-analogous (ASM-0521), and the instrument has no easy-positive battery bounding global severity. The FAIL is an early warning about the PROXY signal, not a quality measurement of the authored set.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] g9's blinded_review_done gate is NOT set; g9's single review stage is NOT consumed; the 50 sheets remain uncontaminated for the human reviewer (proxy labels quarantined, ASM-0553 — violation is a boundary-stop incident).

[ENVELOPE-BOUND, mandatory coverage restatement] Kernel-expressibility coverage is 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; the 50 sheets are DeepNSM test-split words, a favourable authoring surface; no coverage-general authoring claim exists here in either direction.

epistemic_promotions.claim: a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM does NOT endorse the 50 Fable-authored explications at the frozen composite bar (composite 0.18, Wilson UB 0.2850 < 0.34)
epistemic_promotions.scope: this judge (gpt-5.6-sol, effort low, pinned invocation), these 50 pinned sheet bytes, this form-analogous operationalisation; envelope-capped: adjudicates nothing about HS-A

epistemic_promotions.claim: the substitutability leg is the sole composite bottleneck and the cross-translatability leg is content-insensitive for this judge (xt_yes 1.0 real / 0.94 deranged)
epistemic_promotions.scope: this judge, these items; converts the xt-leg weakness from stipulation to demonstration

epistemic_promotions.claim: the crude style-endorsement channel is zero for this judge on this task (deranged-probe false-endorsement 0/50)
epistemic_promotions.scope: substitutability leg only, by construction; the subtle familiarity channel (ASM-0552) and the global-severity channel (ASM-0522) both remain open

epistemic_promotions.claim: 'the authored explications fail human review' or 'the authored explications are adequate but the judge is over-severe'
epistemic_promotions.to: NO PROMOTION — both remain UNMEASURED pending the human g9.review
epistemic_promotions.scope: the fork the human review exists to resolve; neither branch may serve as a premise anywhere

forks_resolved.resolution: REFUTED AT PROXY SCOPE: FAIL-analog fired (UB 0.2850 < 0.34), instrument valid. Per its own registration this is 'the g9-kill analog at this proxy id (early warning, escalate)' — enacted via ASM-0648; resolves nothing outside the proxy id.

CRUDE FORM BOUNDED AT ZERO: probe false-endorsement 0/50, so the instrument stands and the FAIL is not fabricated by style-reflex endorsement (that channel would have pushed the OTHER way). The subtle tradition-familiarity channel (ASM-0552) remains open but is anti-conservative for a FAIL — it cannot explain the low number. The unbounded channel consistent with the FAIL is global judge severity (ASM-0522), unresolved by design, deferred to the human-vs-proxy delta.
FLOOR HELD: retest self-agreement 0.95 >= 0.80; no instrument-instability finding. Its pass direction validates nothing (single judge, by design).

mechanism_state: early-warning-at-proxy-scope: the authoring lane is CAUTIONED (claims paused per ASM-0648), not killed — HS-A is unadjudicated, the frozen human g9 is untouched and unconsumed, and the human g9.review is now the lane's critical path because it simultaneously adjudicates HS-A and measures the proxy severity offset on identical sheet bytes.

questions_opened.question: REAFFIRMED AND SHARPENED, not new: run the frozen g9 GATE-H blinded human review (~4h of a qualified blinded human) on the identical 50 sheets. It was always the sole HS-A adjudicator; the proxy FAIL raises its information value — it now also separates 'authoring genuinely below bar' from 'LLM judge severity' (human-composite minus 0.18 on identical items = the ASM-0522 offset), and unfreezes/refutes the ASM-0648 pause. Quarantine binds: the reviewer must never see proxy labels or this record first (ASM-0553).
blocking: authoring-cost claims in any plan document

questions_opened.question: Cheap instrument successor (new id, Fable-design prereg required): an easy-positive battery for the SAME pinned judge — known-good reductive paraphrases (e.g. DeepNSM reference explications for words DISJOINT from the 50, or validated dictionary-def paraphrases) under the identical blind rendering. Bounds the global-severity channel the current design leaves open: if the judge endorses known-good paraphrases at a high rate, the 0.18 gains meaning; if it refuses those too, the FAIL-analog is largely a severity artifact. Either way stays a weak proxy and substitutes for nothing human.
blocking: any citation of 0.18 as evidence about explication quality rather than judge behaviour

questions_opened.question: $0 exploratory re-analysis of already-logged data (kern re-analyse-before-GPU rule): characterise the 9 endorsed vs 41 non-endorsed sheets (word class, polysemy, explication length/clause count, ambig-example difficulty) to generate authoring-pipeline improvement hypotheses. Quarantined phase:exploratory — uncitable, cannot touch the verdict, and outputs must never reach the human reviewer (ASM-0553).

OPTIONAL (echoes the f2b assessment's stub): repeat the protocol with a second-family judge on the same pinned bytes to bound family-level severity. Lower priority than the severity battery — a second family answers 'is GPT-5.x peculiar', the battery answers 'is this judge harsh in general', and the second is the live question after a FAIL.

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED planning estimates, never measurements. The human review is the only entry that moves HS-A; everything else is instrument hygiene around the proxy signal.

ledger_updates.statement: STAND-IN blinded review FAIL-analog: pinned GPT-5.6-Sol in the g9.review role endorsed 9/50 Fable-authored explications composite (0.18; Wilson LB 0.1078 / UB 0.2850 vs the frozen 0.34 bar). Instrument clean (50/50 labelled, retest 0.95, deranged-probe false-endorsement 0/50). MEASURED-UNAUDITED by rule (audit gate fires on PASS only, ASM-0647). Pre-registered consequence enacted: authoring-cost claims paused + maintainer escalation, formally scoped to the proxy id (ASM-0648). HS-A unadjudicated; human g9 frozen, unconsumed, critical path.
ledger_updates.scope: WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0550); single GPT-5.x-family judge, severity uncalibrated to the published protocol (ASM-0522); 50 DeepNSM test-split sheets; coverage 0.3542 @ molecules-v0 (m0b), not general

ledger_updates.statement: The g9 review instrument's flagged-weakest leg is now demonstrated, not just stipulated: the judged cross-translatability leg is content-insensitive for this judge (xt_yes 1.0 on real sheets, 0.94 on deranged probes), so the composite reduces to the substitutability leg alone (sub_yes 0.18 = composite). Any successor proxy design should treat judged-xt as non-informative; the human review's xt leg may behave differently and is unmeasured.
ledger_updates.scope: this judge, this rendering (ASM-0521/ASM-0523); reported-only fields

ledger_updates.statement: ASM-0522 stays open and now carries the pinned proxy comparator (0.18 composite on the human review's exact sheet bytes); ASM-0552's upward channel cannot explain this outcome (anti-conservative for a FAIL); ASM-0520/0521/0523/0550/0551/0553 honoured in execution; ASM-0647 (audit ruling) and ASM-0648 (pause operationalisation) newly registered by this assessment.

assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Honoured: g9 byte-untouched (frozen_sha256 cf56c5ce... stands), review stage unconsumed, cross-vendor judge used; falls away when the human review runs.

Honoured and now load-bearing for interpretation: the xt leg's content-insensitivity (probe_xt_yes 0.94) confirms the judged-property form diverges from any translation-based protocol; carried as scope on every number here.

Bites in the observed direction: the unbounded global-severity channel is the live alternative to 'authoring below bar'. Comparator now pinned (0.18 on identical sheets); resolves only via the human g9.review.
Honoured; probe executed 50/50 with false-endorsement 0.0 — the instrument-validity direction it exists for. Near-synonym collision risk did not materialise as false endorsement.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0550/ASM-0551/ASM-0553 (shared llmproxy policy, judge mechanism, quarantine)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Honoured: fresh id, envelope binding, pinned mechanism (codex-cli 0.144.1, preflight pass), labels pinned + quarantined from the future human reviewer.
This outcome is UNEXPLAINED by the channel (it pushes up; the result is low) — weak disconfirming pressure at proxy scope, no promotion; resolves via human-vs-proxy deltas across the four task types.

tree_impact: Authoring lane (HS-A / why-now): NO promotion, NO formal demotion — HS-A remains exactly where the frozen g9 left it (unmeasured, human-gated), and the why-now argument is formally untouched per the frozen kill text. What changes is SEQUENCING and CLAIMS-HYGIENE: (1) the pre-registered proxy-FAIL response binds — authoring-cost/capability claims pause in plan documents and the maintainer is escalated (ASM-0648); (2) the human g9.review is promoted to the lane's critical path, with its information value raised by the pinned 0.18 comparator (it now adjudicates HS-A AND measures judge severity in one pass); (3) the g-series ledger gains its second decisively-fired negative signal after g8, but at PROXY grade — unlike g8 this one adjudicates nothing and reverts nothing; (4) cross-lane note: this is the first llmproxy stand-in to fire its FAIL-analog, demonstrating the stand-in policy's designed value (ASM-0550's 'cheap-kill exposure') — the proxies are not a rubber stamp, which retroactively strengthens the evidentiary meaning of the f2b proxy's PASS. Verdict standing: FAIL, MEASURED-UNAUDITED by rule (ASM-0647), audit-not-applicable.
